title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SALIN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SADSADAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUKO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO TALBAN P. BITAYAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
Daily Tribune, May 24, 2022; 118 OG No. 22, 6360 (May 30, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11764, April 29, 2022 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SALIN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SADSADAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUKO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO TALBAN P. BITAYAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

The name of Salin Elementary School located in Barangay Sadsadan, Municipality of Bauko, Mountain Province is hereby changed to Talban P. Bitayan Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall become effective fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALLAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on November 23, 2021 and January 31, 2022, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

APR 29 2022

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
